_comments: Sets JSONType metadata on SecondaryScopes (MJ: Scoped Prompt Parts entity) so CodeGen
emits a typed SecondaryScopesObject accessor returning ISecondaryScopes. Mirrors the
agent runtime's SecondaryScopes shape (ExecuteAgentParams / AIAgentNote / AIAgentRun).
The EntityField row must exist (created by a CodeGen pass over the column) before this
@lookup resolves on push. Run mj sync push then mj codegen to pick up the typed accessor.
SecondaryScopes field — open map of secondary scope dimensions

primaryKey.ID: @lookup:MJ: Entity Fields.EntityID=@lookup:MJ: Entities.Name=MJ: Scoped Prompt Parts&Name=SecondaryScopes
